title: Crate Delight: Croptopia
description: Useful crates and bags for Croptopia that will save you storage and look great.
body:
![Crate Delight: Croptopia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W6Xlp26Z/images/2a6e8a58eabac85320c1a70fa1f1ffb6a63caa27.png)
**Expand Crate Delight with storage solutions for Croptopia!** This add-on for **Crate Delight** adds specialized crates and bags for storing all **Croptopia** crops and items. Perfect for players looking to organize their farms and pantries. ## 🌽 Features - **Crates:** Store crops like Artichoke, Bell Pepper, Corn, Blackberry, Tomato, and many more. - **Bags:** For smaller ingredients like Black Beans, Blueberries, Rice, Olives, **Peanuts**, and many more.
## ✨ Seamless Integration - Just gather Croptopia items and start crafting crates or bags. [Download Croptopia here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia). [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
